description_long: This is a stylish pair of sunglasses featuring a bold, full-rim rectangular frame with a vibrant red front and contrasting gray temples. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing significant shading and a classic look. The temples are straight and moderately thick, with the word 'TRAFFIC' printed in uppercase letters on the outer side of each arm. Small green and yellow accent dots are visible on the front corners of the frame, adding a touch of detail. The overall design is modern and urban, suitable for casual wear in city environments. The construction appears lightweight and ergonomic, designed for comfort and everyday use.
description: A modern pair of sunglasses with a red rectangular frame, dark lenses, and gray temples featuring 'TRAFFIC' branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red rectangular frame, dark lenses, and small green and yellow accent dots at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight gray temple with 'TRAFFIC' branding and the frame's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the gray temples and the full width of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other gray temple with 'TRAFFIC' branding and the frame's profile.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular full-rim frame with moderate thickness, straight temples, and subtle accent dots at the front corners. The frame has a modern, urban style with clean lines and a robust structure.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark, nearly black tint with uniform coverage and high opacity, providing strong sun protection. No gradient or mirrored effect is visible.
attribute_bridge_style: Integrated saddle-style bridge, smoothly connecting the two lenses with a gentle curve and no separate nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, moderately thick, and feature the printed word 'TRAFFIC' in uppercase letters. No additional engravings or embellishments are present.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'TRAFFIC' is printed on the outer side of both temples, serving as a visible brand logo.
